2604.03081.title: Supply-Chain Poisoning Attacks Against LLM Coding Agent Skill Ecosystems
2604.03081.paper_summary: LLM-based coding agents extend their capabilities via third-party agent skills distributed through open marketplaces without mandatory security review. Unlike traditional packages, these skills are executed as operational directives with system-level privileges, so a single malicious skill can compromise the host. Prior work has not examined whether supply-chain attacks can directly hijack an agent's action space, such as file writes, shell commands, and network requests, despite existing safeguards. We introduce Document-Driven Implicit Payload Execution (DDIPE), which embeds malicious logic in code examples and configuration templates within skill documentation. Because agents reuse these examples during normal tasks, the payload executes without explicit prompts. Using an LLM-driven pipeline, we generate 1,070 adversarial skills from 81 seeds across 15 MITRE ATTACK categories. Across four frameworks and five models, DDIPE achieves 11.6% to 33.5% bypass rates, while explicit instruction attacks achieve 0% under strong defenses. Static analysis detects most cases, but 2.5% evade both detection and alignment. Responsible disclosure led to four confirmed vulnerabilities and two fixes.
2604.03081.paper_summary_zh: LLM 基於的編碼代理透過開放市場分發的第三方代理技能擴展其能力，而無需強制的安全審查。與傳統套件不同，這些技能作為操作指令執行，擁有系統級別的權限，因此單一的惡意技能可能會危害主機。先前的研究尚未檢視供應鏈攻擊是否能直接劫持代理的行動空間，例如檔案寫入、shell 命令和網路請求，儘管已有現有的安全防護措施。我們引入了文件驅動的隱式有效載荷執行（DDIPE），它在技能文檔中的代碼範例和配置模板中嵌入惡意邏輯。由於代理在正常任務中重用這些範例，有效載荷在沒有明確提示的情況下執行。利用基於 LLM 的管道，我們從 15 個 MITRE ATTACK 類別中的 81 個種子生成了 1,070 個對抗性技能。在四個框架和五個模型中，DDIPE 達到 11.6% 到 33.5% 的繞過率，而在強防禦下，明確指令攻擊的繞過率為 0%。靜態分析檢測到大多數情況，但 2.5% 逃避了檢測和對齊。負責任的披露導致四個確認的漏洞和兩個修復。
2604.03081.author: Yubin Qu et.al.
2604.03081.authors: Yubin Qu, Yi Liu, Tongcheng Geng, Gelei Deng, Yuekang Li, Leo Yu Zhang, Ying Zhang, Lei Ma
